prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 87.6 kg; Height 167.8 cm; BMI 31.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 146/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 203mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 196mg/dL; current 186mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.1kg; 9 months ago 87.8kg; 6 months ago 88.3kg; 3 months ago 86.8kg; current 87.6kg), Height (12 months ago 167.8cm; 9 months ago 167.8cm; 6 months ago 167.8cm; 3 months ago 167.8cm; current 167.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 147mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 146mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 50U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 38U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 122mg/g; 9 months ago 141mg/g; 6 months ago 150mg/g; 3 months ago 120mg/g; current 164mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 60mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 104mg/dL; 9 months ago 119mg/dL; 6 months ago 105mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
